content.en:
Boom Boom Boom !!

Ye Tian shot again and again, making the Heavenly Star Demon Lord desperate.

Although Ye Tian's real strength is not as good as Su Ho before he broke through, Su Ho's casual blow is only to this extent.

If Ye Tianxiu broke through a little again, it would be no less than the real Soho.

How long has Ye Tiancai cultivated, he has reached this level.

The Heavenly Star Demon Lord was extremely desperate, he had just obtained the Innate Primordial Treasure!

"Ye Tian, I am willing to give you all my treasures, I just ask you to spare my life!"

The Celestial Star Demon Lord begged for mercy.

However, it is useless.

Rumble!!!

Another blow came, completely killing the Celestial Star Demon Lord.

Ye Tian took the items on the Heavenly Star Demon Lord's body and left here.

......

"Hey, what is this?"

Ye Tian saw a strange statue among the items on the Heavenly Star Demon Lord's body, and the aura on it made him extremely frightened.

"Definitely a good thing!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, this place is undoubtedly not suitable for research, so he put it away and wait until he goes out to study it slowly.

Next, Ye Tian was still looking for legendary-level creatures in the legendary ruins.

Finally, on this day, a legendary creature with only ordinary legendary blood was found.

However, the strength of this legendary-level creature is very strong, and its cultivation is comparable to that of the legendary to the peak of the Dao realm, and the body of legend is also comparable to the body of legend in the realm of Dacheng, and its combat effectiveness is naturally not bad.

However, Ye Tian's strength was even stronger, and he directly killed the other party with one move.

However, a piece of legendary blood was nothing to Ye Tian, and he had a bunch of such legendary blood in his hands.

Only the blood of the top legends and the blood of the strongest legends will be somewhat attractive to him.

......

Legend has it that the ancient ruins are somewhere.

On the side of the Void Demon, the Lonely Goose Demon Lord is looking for legendary creatures.

Suddenly, he was captivated by a piece of debris.

There was a nest in the middle of this fragment, and the breath of a legendary creature emanated from the inside of the nest.

"Finally found a legendary creature!"

The Lonely Goose Demon Lord was excited.

If you can find a top-level legendary creature, you can obtain the top-level legendary blood, thus strengthening your own lineage.

Moreover, there is more than one top-level bloodline in his own vein, the Ninefold Dao Realm, and they all need the blood of top-level legends.

Wow!

He entered the lair and saw a legendary creature lying there.

This legendary creature is a legendary dragon creature covered in hard dragon scales, with three dragon heads and extremely sharp claws, exuding a terrifying aura.

Moreover, this legendary creature is also covered with red stripes, which run through the dragon scales and all parts of its body, and even the three heads are covered with red stripes.

"This is a legendary creature with the blood of the strongest legend - the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon!"

He originally wanted to encounter a legendary creature with top-level legendary blood, but he didn't expect to come across a legendary creature with the blood of supreme legend.

Surprise!

Rumble!!!!

The Lone Goose Demon Lord immediately attacked the three-headed dragon of Red Flame and wanted to kill it.

However.

Rumble!!!!

The three-headed dragon of Chiyan woke up, and the scales on its body urged with all their might, and they forcibly blocked the attack of the Lonely Goose Demon Lord.

While!!!!!

The Lonely Goose Demon Lord's legendary supreme weapon hit the body of the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon, but it didn't even break its defense.

"The Legendary Body of the Perfection Realm!!!"

The Lonely Goose Demon Lord was shocked.

How did this Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon actually be able to cultivate the Legendary Body to the Perfection Realm in the Legendary Ancient Ruins?

It stands to reason that if you don't have enough resources, you can't do it at all, even if you practice penance for endless years and don't get discovered, you can't do it!

"This is not normal, even if the Chiyan Three-Headed Dragon is a legendary-level creature, naturally suitable for cultivating the Legendary Body, it is many times easier than our Dao Void Demon, but there must be a lack of resources here!"

The Lonely Goose Demon Lord was puzzled.

But at this moment, it is not the time for him to be stunned, he wants to fight desperately and kill this three-headed dragon of Chiyan.

Thundered!!!

The Lone Goose Demon Lord kept attacking, bombarding this red flame three-headed dragon.

In order to kill the three-headed dragon of Chiyan, he even used all kinds of hole cards and used all kinds of means.

"Give me death!"

The Lone Goose Demon Lord cast a killing move and slashed at the neck of the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon.

Click!

The scales on the neck of the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon were shattered.

Just as the Lonely Goose Demon Lord was overjoyed, the scales on the neck of the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon actually healed instantly.

"What's going on????

The Lonely Goose Demon Lord was a little stunned.

When did the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon have such a terrifying recovery speed? He had never heard of it!

The Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon is so terrifying to recover from its injuries, how can it be fought?

Soon.

The Lonely Goose Demon Lord began to get injured, and he couldn't defeat this Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon.

He didn't want to call other demon lords, after all, it was just a piece of the blood of the strongest legend!

"No matter, call the other demon lords over, and discuss with each other, even if I can't get the blood of the strongest legend, you have to give me a copy of the blood of the top legend!" said the Lone Goose Demon Lord secretly.

Thereupon.

He summoned the other three demon lords, who were the three demon lords he thought had the best relationship, and he agreed on the conditions in advance, and then informed them of the specific location.

"Wait, it won't be long before the three demon lords are coming, and the four demon lords will kill one of them, and I'm afraid I won't be able to kill it?"

The Lonely Goose Demon Lord thought to himself.

After a while, the three demon lords came.

"Sure enough, it's the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon, hahaha, kill it first, whoever wants this blood of the strongest legend must give the other three enough benefits. "The Lonely Goose Demon Lord said.

"Good!"

The other three demon lords replied.

Immediately, the four demon lords besieged this three-headed dragon of Chiyan.

Thundered!!!!!

More fierce battles broke out.

The recovery ability of the Chiyan Three-Headed Dragon undoubtedly frightened the four demon masters, but after fighting for a long time, the consumption of the Chiyan Three-Headed Dragon was not small, and gradually its combat effectiveness weakened.

As if sensing that he was in a weak position, the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon prepared to flee.

Wow!

It fled quickly, while the four demon lords chased frantically and tried to trap each other, but the speed of the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon was also relatively fast.

In this way, the three-headed dragon of Chiyan fled all the way.

Along the way, there were also legends from the Innate Origin Domain Alliance that sensed this Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon, but they couldn't kill it.

Gradually, the Chiyan Three-Headed Dragon was chased by the Legendary Dao Realm attacks along the way, and his injuries became more and more serious, but there would be no problems for a while.

But this day.

The Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon encountered one of the top Demon Lords.
